---
title: Export Seurat counts and metadata
date: 2023-03-19
metadata-files: 
  - _metadata.yml
  - ../_quarto.yml
---

## Goal of this analysis

To extract the RNA counts and metadata from the Aldinger dataset provided by Liam.


## Files and directories

### Code

See `<isilon human Aldinger data directory>/glutamatergic_dev_Liam.RDS` for the Seurat object containing the glutamatergic cells from Aldinger et al. (2021) and annotated by Liam Hendrikse.

### Output

See `<pyscenic results directory>/20230319/` for the CSV files with the counts and metadata.


## Results

The counts from the RNA assay (i.e., `srat[["RNA"]]@counts`) were used to generate `rna_counts.csv`.

The Seurat object metadata in `srat@meta.data` was used to generate `metadata.csv`.

These files will be used for running pySCENIC.
